description: Style Note Let this stunning sling bag in orange colour be a perfect blend with your attire. You might just expect a lot of compliments for this prized possession of yours. This beautiful orange mobile pouch is a chic and convenient way to store your mobile phone. Also, you can keep your coins and some small items of daily needs in its front pockets. These pouches are worthy of the latest mobiles, and the fashionable ladies who carry these mobiles.   Product Details Orange coloured sling bagHas flaps with snap button closure on both sides One main zippered compartment Orange coloured detachable sling   Zip pockets on both the flapsOne pocket with zip closure on the back Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust      Size Height: 12 cm Width: 18 cm Depth: 3 cm
